subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: The poor of this world suffer: we should care for them. The poor are nearer the kingdom of heaven than the rich.
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @charitable associations; humanitarian activities
